texts.orig: Problem 3.2: (2.5 #24. Introduction to Linear Algebra: Strang) Use GaussJordan elimination on [ U I ] to find the upper triangular U -1 :
texts.text: Problem 3.2: (2.5 #24. Introduction to Linear Algebra: Strang) Use GaussJordan elimination on [ U I ] to find the upper triangular U -1 :

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Solution: Row reduce [ U I ] to get [ I U - 1 ] as follows (here, Ri = row i )
texts.text: Solution: Row reduce [ U I ] to get [ I U - 1 ] as follows (here, Ri = row i )
